translations.en: a huge, dark-skined man with a close-set face.
translations.zh: 一位身材魁梧、皮膚黝黑、五官緊湊的男子。

translations.note: island greeting = hello friend; keep untranslated

translations.en: "@Ombogo @dono," he grunts at you from behind a large forge.
translations.zh: 「@Ombogo @dono，」他在大火爐後方咕噥著向汝打招呼。

translations.en: "I have many things here. You want @arms or @armor?"
translations.zh: 「吾這裡有許多東西。汝要@arms（武器）還是@armor（盔甲）？」

translations.en: "Utomo remember you, how you not remember @Utomo?"
translations.zh: 「烏托摩記得汝，汝怎麼不記得@Utomo（烏托）摩？」

translations.en: "Utomo mean 'island' in my language. I also from island."*
translations.zh: 「烏托摩在吾的語言意思是『島』。吾也來自海島。」*

translations.en: "Bring magic @fan from island. This town new @home for Utomo now."
translations.zh: 「吾從海島帶來魔法@fan（扇子）。這座城鎮現在是烏托摩的新@home（家）。」

translations.en: "Lady on island make magic fans. They make big wind, blow ships all around."
translations.zh: 「海島上有位女士製作魔法扇子。那些扇子能生大風，把船隻吹得到處亂轉。」

translations.en: "Utomo make good @weapons. Make one for you if you like."
translations.zh: 「烏托摩打造好@weapons（武器）。如果汝喜歡，可以為汝打一把。」

translations.en: "Learn to make as boy. I live on island then."
translations.zh: 「小時候學的。那時吾住在海島上。」

translations.en: "I come here from @many days away. My home burned by @evil man."
translations.zh: 「吾從@many（很遠）的地方來到這裡。吾的家被@evil（壞人）燒毀了。」

translations.en: "I not sure where. Got ride on big @ship."
translations.zh: 「吾不確定在哪裡。搭上了一艘大@ship（船）。」

translations.en: "I stow away when night come. After long time we land and I jump off."
translations.zh: 「夜晚降臨時吾偷藏在船上。過了很久，船靠岸，吾就跳下去了。」

translations.en: "He say to me, 'You man, you leave home and @kill good people with me.' I ran from him."
translations.zh: 「他對吾說，『你是男子漢，跟我走，離開家鄉去@kill（殺好）人。』吾逃離了他。」

translations.en: "Like people in town. Like Lord British."
translations.zh: 「像城鎮裡的人。像不列顛王那樣的好人。」

translations.en: "Utomo go and drink at her home."
She try @kiss Utomo. Utomo say, 'I no want you' but she kiss anyway."
translations.zh: 她想@kiss（親吻）烏托摩。烏托摩說『吾不要』，但她還是親了。」

translations.en: "Someday Utomo go back and get her."
translations.zh: 「總有一天烏托摩會回去找她。」

translations.en: He plays the poker over the hot coals and looks absently into the fire.
translations.zh: 他用撥火棍撥弄熱炭，心不在焉地凝視著火焰。

translations.en: "Her name Yuna. She good tree climber. I not see her for long time."
translations.zh: 「她叫由奈。她很擅長爬樹。吾已很久沒見到她了。」

translations.en: "In my land it mean 'You have good meal in sun.'"
translations.zh: 「在吾的家鄉，那句話意思是『願你在陽光下飽食』。」

translations.note: bye in island language; keep untranslated

translations.en: "I speak not too much your language."
"Come to my shop when I'm open!"
"But you no have thing I want!"
"Good!" $N hands $Y #7 gold pieces and takes the $0.
"Come to my shop when I'm open!"
After accepting $Y's gold, $N hands over the $1.
translations.zh: 收下 $Y 的金幣後，$N 遞出 $1。

translator_notes: 烏托摩是個以第三人稱自稱的外來鐵匠，英語生硬但直率可愛。保留島語詞彙（Ombogo/sano/dono/Omdu Yaf）不翻譯，改以括號說明。由奈（Yuna）是他在故鄉的戀人。
